Notes: Single UPDATE deletes an RRset and then adds an RR at the same owner name/type, which exposes whether the server applies UPDATE operations strictly sequentially or treats same-message delete/add conflicts differently.

Steps.Description: Delete the existing A RRset at flip.campus.edu. and then add a new A RR at the same name in the same UPDATE message.

Steps.Name: flip.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the A RRset exists after the UPDATE.
